## Checklist

- [ ] Live and freely accessible, no paywall
- [ ] Teaches building the thing from scratch, not using a prebuilt tool or library
- [ ] A written tutorial or course with real code, not a bare code repository
- [ ] Added in the `* [**Language**: _Title_](url)` format, grouped by language within the section
- [ ] If offensive, it is framed for authorized testing, CTFs, or defensive learning
